expectations.text: Written in plain, peer-to-peer engineering tone with no marketing hype adjectives (no 'revolutionary', 'blazing', 'seamless', 'game-changing')
Concrete and specific about what the tool does and how (commands, mechanism, or workflow shown)
expectations.evidence: Concrete sample diff output and command example.

expectations.text: Acknowledges at least one limitation, trade-off, or non-goal
expectations.evidence: States read-only/no-data limitation and lists objects still on the roadmap.

expectations.text: Claims are demonstrable and specific rather than superlative
Reads as a Show HN post (first-person, direct, invites feedback), not a press release
expectations.evidence: Reads as a Show HN first comment with targeted feedback asks.
